hypertrophy.reasoning: Squat and jerk tax quads, glutes, and anterior chain heavily; accessory work targets posterior chain and arm hypertrophy.

siri_text: Monday's workout. Strength: Back Squat, 2 by 2 at 95 percent. Strength: Split Jerk, 3 by 2 at 70 percent. Metcon: AMRAP 10 minutes: 12/10 cal row, 10 2xDB Hang Power Clean (22.5/15kg), 12 V-ups, 100m KB Farmer Carry (24/16). For hypertrophy, focus on back (lats/mid-back), biceps, rear delts.
